title: hieracium glaucinum subsp. baliophyllum
intro: Hieracium glaucinum subsp. baliophyllum, also known as hawkweed, is a plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae) that is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Hieracium glaucinum subsp. baliophyllum include its potential to lower blood sugar levels and exhibit antimicrobial activity. The plant is traditionally used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use is not well-documented and more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
